Release AAB build requested: 2026-07-14T20:15:00Z (v1.3.1 — iOS push-notification fix + keyboard glow + version bump)
version: 1.3.1 (build name 1.3.1; versionCode = build-aab run number, strictly increasing)
signing: Play upload key SHA-1 EA:3B (from UPLOAD_* secrets / embedded)
package: com.whoisthere.app (matches Play Console)
note: v1.3.1 — everything from v1.3.0 (friends experience overhaul: groups,
  push invites, round-end scoreboard, tricks toggle, proverbs host-picked
  round count, save/share round images with a download QR) is included, plus:
  fixed an iOS-only race where the FCM token registration could fail right
  after a fresh launch (apns-token-not-set), which could leave the invite
  recipient's push token stale exactly when a push needed to send; and the
  turn-based letter keyboard now visibly pulses green on tappable keys
  during your turn, not just the panel border.
note2: versionCode auto = build-aab run number.
note3: version bumped to 1.3.1 to match the iOS build (Apple already has an
  approved 1.3.0 on file and closed that pre-release train to new builds).
trigger: session-branch push (MCP workflow_dispatch lacks actions:write)
